landing.heroSubtitle: Voice-first platform for supporting children with ASD. Child signals → adult speaks → AI structures → system helps spot repeated patterns.
landing.familySetupHint: Enter your child's name — it will replace the demo data across the app. You can change it later in the profile.
landing.rolesSubtitle: Choose who is using the system now
landing.featureTimelineDesc: Unified event feed from child, tutor and specialist
landing.featureAiDesc: Hypotheses and patterns. Not a diagnosis — just hints
landing.disclaimer: Qoldau AI is not a medical device, does not diagnose, treat or replace a specialist. All AI outputs are formulated as hypotheses: "Seems like…", "Possibly…", "Needs confirmation." Can be discussed with a specialist.

healthCheck.title: System status
healthCheck.backendDown: Backend unavailable. App is running in demo mode.

aiReview.title: AI review
aiReview.subtitle: Review and confirm
aiReview.noEvents: AI could not extract events. Try describing in more detail.
aiReview.defaultInsight: This is an observation, not a diagnosis. You can rephrase or discard.
aiReview.hintFooter: Events will appear in Event Timeline after your confirmation on the next step.

home.title: Tutor home
home.subtitle: Quick observations
hints: Before transitions, give a 1–2 minute warning.
A 2–3 minute pause often helps with anxiety.
Use a visual schedule for sessions.
AAC cards 'Toilet' and 'Water' are confirmed by the child.

voice.title: Observation recording
voice.subtitle: Speak in plain language
voice.hint: Describe what happened during the session. AI will suggest a structure.
examples: Used the visual schedule, transitions were calmer
Covered ears with loud music, headphones helped
Asked for a pause — it helped

aiReview.noEvents: AI did not extract events. You can save a general note.
aiReview.defaultInsight: This is an observation, not a diagnosis. You can discuss it with a specialist.

report.subtitle: Summary for 7 days

childProfile.title: Child profile
preferencesList: Calmer in the first half of the day
childProfile.disclaimer: This is an observation profile, not a medical diagnosis. All formulations are cautious.

dashboard.title: Specialist dashboard
dashboard.subtitle: KPI and patterns
dashboard.openEventsHint: Full Event Timeline for the child
dashboard.noData: No observations yet. When the family and tutor start recording events, summary hints will appear here. This is an observation, not a diagnosis.
dashboard.sensoryHint: Sensory events appear frequently — check Behavior & Sensory.
dashboard.commHint: Many communication signals — check Communication profile.
dashboard.openTimelineDesc: All parent, tutor, and child observations — unified stream
dashboard.repeatingDisclaimer: These are hypotheses based on event frequency. Not a diagnosis.
dashboard.whatHelpedDisclaimer: Examples to illustrate the format. Real data will appear after enough observations.

abc.title: ABC analysis
abc.subtitle: {{name}} · triggers and consequences
abc.abcExplanation: A — what happened BEFORE the behavior (trigger). B — the behavior itself. C — what happened AFTER. Analyzing patterns helps understand what causes difficulties and what helps.
abc.patternsHint: These are examples to illustrate the format. Real patterns will appear once enough observations are collected.
abc.insightText: ABC patterns are hypotheses based on observations. This is not a diagnosis. You can discuss them with a specialist and the family.

communication.title: Communication profile
communication.subtitle: {{name}} · {{count}} signals
communication.aiNeutral: This is an observation, not a diagnosis. Needs confirmation.
communication.progressHint: These are observations based on data. Not a medical assessment. Real counts will appear once enough observations are collected.
communication.progressDisclaimer: +X new — example of dynamics. Not a clinical progress measure.
communication.openTimelineHint: These signals are collected from Timeline observations

aiObservations.enoughSignals: It looks like enough confirmed signals are being collected. This will help the specialist better understand the child's communication.
aiObservations.childAac: The child is starting to use AAC cards — great progress in communication!
aiObservations.moreData: The more observations, the more accurate the profile. Keep recording signals.

carePatterns.title: Care patterns
carePatterns.subtitle: {{name}} · event connections
carePatterns.timeOfDay: What time of day is hardest
carePatterns.timeOfDayHint: Sensory reactions and anxiety — by time of day.
carePatterns.hypothesisNote: This is a hypothesis based on observations. Not a diagnosis. You can discuss with a specialist.
carePatterns.bigPictureDisclaimer: Hypotheses, not conclusions. Needs confirmation through observations.
carePatterns.bigPictureText: Anxiety seems to appear 20–30 minutes after food or with noise. Possible connection to digestion or sensory overload. Calm mode and short pauses help. This is an observation, not a diagnosis.
carePatterns.openTimelineHint: These patterns are built from Timeline observations
carePatterns.aiInsight: It looks like you can track water consumption and its connection to behavior events. This is an observation, not a diagnosis. You can discuss it with a specialist.
carePatterns.foodToSensoryDesc: It seems that after eating, a sensory reaction sometimes appears. You can discuss with a specialist.
carePatterns.calmHelpsDesc: Calm mode was used {{count}} times. After a pause, the child seems to return to activities calmer.

supportPlan.title: Support plan
supportPlan.subtitle: {{name}}, {{age}} years old
supportPlan.warning: This is a support plan. Not a treatment plan. All steps are hypotheses, not medical prescriptions.
supportPlan.discussTitle: What to discuss with a specialist:
supportPlan.discussBody: current behavior patterns, sensory support, communication development.
toTryList: Transition timer (2 min before activity change)

reports.title: Reports
reports.subtitle: Based on Event Timeline data
reports.noDataHint: Not enough observations yet — add voice or AAC cards, and the weekly summary will appear here. This is an observation, not a diagnosis.
reports.withDataHint: {{total}} events recorded this week from parent, tutor and child. This is an observation, not a diagnosis. You can keep observing to see dynamics.
reports.noObservations: No observations this week yet. When they appear, a brief overview will be here.
reports.recommendation: It looks like recurring signals and contexts will help see dynamics. You can keep observing and discuss with the family.
reports.recommendationStrong: This is an observation, not a diagnosis.
reports.disclaimer: Qoldau AI is an observation profile, not a medical device.
reports.shareUnavailable: Sharing is not available on this device
reports.shareText: Observation profile for {{name}} (Qoldau). These are observations, not a diagnosis.

exit.parentHint: Switching user. Local data is preserved.
exit.childHint: Returning to start screen to choose parent, tutor or specialist.

gate.title: Прежде чем записывать
gate.subtitle: Согласие родителя / представителя
gate.intro: Запись голоса — это обработка детских данных. Пожалуйста, прочитайте коротко, что мы делаем и чего не делаем.
gate.checkbox: Я родитель или законный представитель и даю согласие на обработку данных, описанную выше.
gate.hint: Согласие сохраняется на этом устройстве. Можно изменить в «Настройки → Согласия и приватность».

policy.title: Приватность — пилот
policy.subtitle: Qoldau AI · v1.0
policy.intro: Qoldau AI — инструмент для наблюдений за коммуникацией и состоянием ребёнка.
policy.notMedical: This is not a medical device: the app does not diagnose or treat.
policy.storage: Все данные о ребёнке (имя, события, наблюдения) хранятся только на вашем устройстве. Мы не храним их на серверах и не передаём третьим лицам, кроме случая ниже.
policy.stt: When you record a voice observation, the audio is sent to our server and then to OpenAI services (Whisper for speech, gpt-4o-mini for analysis). Audio and result are not stored on our servers.
policy.control: Вы в любый момент можете удалить все данные в настройках приложения («Очистить данные»).
policy.children: Приложением управляет взрослый (родитель или законный представитель), который даёт согласие при первом запуске.
policy.footer: Pilot-версия для внутреннего тестирования. Перед публичным запуском требуется юридический обзор.

settings.notAcceptedHint: Запись голоса недоступна без согласия родителя
settings.policyHint: Что мы делаем и чего не делаем с данными
settings.clearHint: Удалит события, имя ребёнка и согласие

tutorial.step1Body: Один тап — и можно говорить. Запись превратится в событие в Timeline.
tutorial.step1Item1: Нажмите на большую кнопку с микрофоном
tutorial.step1Item2: Расскажите, что произошло — спокойно, своими словами
tutorial.step1Item3: Нажмите кнопку ещё раз, чтобы остановить и отправить
tutorial.step2Body: Распознавание превращает речь в текст, AI аккуратно структурирует его в события.
tutorial.step2Item2: AI раскладывает наблюдение по типам (еда, вода, настроение)
tutorial.step2Item3Hint: Любые выводы стоит обсудить со специалистом.

voiceAiUnavailable.title: Распознавание сейчас недоступно
voiceAiUnavailable.body: Сервер подключён, но AI-анализ сейчас не работает. Можно сохранить наблюдение текстом вручную или попробовать записать позже.
